title: CTAs from copywriting strategies
use_when: CTAs from copywriting strategies. Use when the user needs a product workflow for design & prototyping related to ctas from copywriting strategies. Trigger terms: pm, marketing, cta.
do_not_use_when: Do not use CTAs from copywriting strategies when the request is mainly a different lifecycle artifact; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: CTAs from copywriting strategies UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks
framework_fit: CTAs from copywriting strategies fits Marketing work in the Design lifecycle when the user needs CTAs from copywriting strategies UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces CTAs from copywriting strategies UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks without tying recommendations to the user's Design stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats CTAs from copywriting strategies as generic Marketing advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from CTAs from copywriting strategies when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $ctas-from-copywriting-strategies to turn this ctas context into a decision-ready CTAs from copywriting strategies UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks.
examples.expected_artifact: CTAs from copywriting strategies UX/design review with findings, constraints, fixes, and acceptance checks
